scqa.situation: Coherent Corp. is a diversified photonics and compound semiconductor company formed from the 2022 merger of II-VI and legacy Coherent. The combined entity serves hyperscaler datacenters, telecom networks, and industrial laser markets. Revenue for Q3 FY2026 (period ended March 31, 2026) was $1,805.6M, up 26% year-over-year, with datacom transceiver volumes surging on 800G AI-infrastructure buildout. Networking segment revenue reached $1,118.5M (62% of total), Materials $379.2M (21%), Lasers $307.9M (17%). Non-GAAP gross margin improved from 33.5% in Q3 FY2025 to 37.6% in Q3 FY2026, representing 410 basis points of expansion.
scqa.complication: Despite top-line acceleration, Coherent carries $3.2B in net debt from the merger, GAAP net income remains in loss territory ($-39.5M in Q3 FY2026), and its SiC power device business faces a near-term inventory correction in EV. The company must simultaneously deleverage, ramp 1.6T transceivers, and integrate legacy operations — a three-front execution challenge. Total shares outstanding: 133.6M. Interest expense: approximately $270M annualized at ~6.3% average rate on $4.3B gross debt. Net GAAP loss of $39.5M in Q3 FY2026 vs loss of $188.4M in Q3 FY2025, representing 79% improvement YoY despite ongoing amortization of $2.1B in intangibles.
scqa.question: Can Coherent monetize its datacom leadership fast enough to offset SiC headwinds and reduce leverage before 2027, and is the current valuation pricing this transition fairly?
scqa.answer: Yes — with caveats. Datacom transceiver revenue is ramping faster than consensus modeled (800G volumes tracking 40%+ above street consensus estimates per channel checks). The SiC correction is a 2H FY2026 drag but auto OEM design wins are intact. Base case 12-month price target: US$115. Risk-adjusted thesis: HOLD with accumulate-on-weakness bias below US$85. Probability-weighted PT: $113 (Bear $68 × 25% + Base $115 × 55% + Bull $155 × 20% = $113). Current price $96.50 implies 17% upside to probability-weighted PT.

key_points: Datacom transceiver revenue +52% YoY in Q3 FY2026, driven by 800G adoption at hyperscalers (Google, Meta, Microsoft confirmed orders per earnings call)
Management guided Q4 FY2026 revenue $1,860–1,960M (midpoint $1,910M) with non-GAAP gross margin 38.0–40.0%
SiC power device inventory correction now expected to clear by Q1 FY2027 per CFO commentary — auto design wins preserved
Debt reduction plan: $400M paid down in FY2026, targeting ≤3.0x net debt/EBITDA by end FY2027 from ~3.8x current
1.6T transceiver qualification at 3 Tier-1 hyperscalers in H2 2026 — first revenue expected Q1 FY2027
FCF generated $135M in Q3 FY2026 (vs -$30M in Q3 FY2025); FY2026 FCF guidance implies ~$500M full-year
Non-GAAP OpEx $310M in Q3 FY2026 (17.2% of revenue), down from 21.4% in Q3 FY2025

company_data.description: Coherent Corp. is a global leader in engineered materials and optoelectronics components. Products span optical communications transceivers (800G, 1.6T), semiconductor lasers, compound semiconductor wafers (SiC, GaAs, InP), and industrial laser systems. Formed by II-VI Incorporated's acquisition of legacy Coherent in January 2022, the company now operates across Networking, Materials, and Lasers segments with manufacturing in 30+ countries.

segments.name: Networking
segments.description: Optical transceivers (400G/800G/1.6T), ROADMs, amplifiers, active optical cables for hyperscaler DC and telecom carrier networks

segments.name: Materials
segments.description: SiC substrates for EV power devices; GaAs, InP compound semiconductor wafers; engineered ceramics and optics

segments.name: Lasers
segments.description: Industrial CO2 and fiber lasers for cutting, welding, medical, and defense applications

company_data.segment_detail: Q3 FY2026 segment revenue: Networking $1,118.5M (+52% YoY), Materials $379.2M (-3% YoY due to SiC correction), Lasers $307.9M (+12% YoY). Networking gross margin ~46%, Materials ~28%, Lasers ~32%.

financials.source: Coherent Corp. Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-06 (SEC EDGAR CIK 0000820318, period ended 2026-03-31) and 8-K earnings release filed 2026-04-29

balance_sheet.source: Coherent Corp. Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-06, Balance Sheet as of March 31, 2026

guidance.source: Coherent Corp. 8-K filed 2026-04-29, Q3 FY2026 earnings press release

management_quotes.speaker: Jim Anderson, President & CEO
management_quotes.quote: Our datacom transceiver business continues to outperform expectations. 800G is ramping strongly and we are already qualifying 1.6T with multiple hyperscalers. This is the clearest secular tailwind we have seen in optical networking.
management_quotes.source: Coherent Corp. 8-K Exhibit 99.2 (earnings call transcript), filed 2026-04-29, SEC EDGAR

management_quotes.speaker: Mary Jane Raymond, CFO
management_quotes.quote: We generated $135 million of free cash flow in the quarter and remain committed to reducing net leverage to below 3.0x by the end of fiscal 2027. The SiC volume correction in automotive is a near-term headwind, but our design win pipeline remains intact and we expect recovery beginning in Q1 FY2027.
management_quotes.source: Coherent Corp. 8-K Exhibit 99.2 (earnings call transcript), filed 2026-04-29, SEC EDGAR

product_deep_dive.why_key: Datacom transceivers are Coherent's highest-margin, fastest-growing product line. 800G adoption is being driven by AI training clusters (NVidia H100/H200 DGX pods) requiring 800G SR8 and DR8 links. 1.6T transceivers are next-gen for Ethernet-based AI fabrics.

specs.detail: Coherent EML (Electro-absorption Modulated Laser) + InP PIC
800G: volume production; 1.6T: qualifying at 3 Tier-1 hyperscalers as of Q3 FY2026

product_deep_dive.revenue_contribution: Networking segment $1,118.5M in Q3 FY2026 (62% of total); datacom transceivers ~50% of segment per company disclosures
product_deep_dive.market_size: Global 800G transceiver TAM estimated at US$3.2B in 2025, growing to US$7.5B by 2027 (CAGR 53%). Coherent market share estimated 25-30% in 800G (vs 35% in 400G peak).
product_deep_dive.revenue_detail: Datacom transceivers generated ~$560M in Q3 FY2026 (estimated from company disclosures: ~50% of $1,118.5M Networking segment). This implies annual run-rate ~$2.2B for transceiver-specific revenue.

technical.volume_trend: 成交量在突破 $95 時放大，顯示買盤確認
technical.note: 多頭格局維持，需突破 $105 確認趨勢延續

cashflow.title: 現金流分析（FY2025A–FY2027E）
cashflow.lead: Q3 FY2026 FCF M（CFO M - Capex M）。FY2026E 全年 FCF 估 M，支撐去槓桿計畫。

cff.label: FCF Q3 FY2026
cff.note: CFO Mary Jane Raymond verbatim, earnings call 2026-04-29

cashflow.fcf_note: FY2026E 全年 FCF 估 M（基礎情境），用於償債 M（部分以 OCF 餘額補足）。

runway.note: 含可轉換票據及定期貸款

cashflow.runway_conclusion: 流動性充足（.1B 現金 + 未動用信貸額度），但高槓桿（3.8x）是核心監控指標。FY2027 目標降至 3.0x 以下。

bear.label: 保守
bear.assumption: SiC correction extends to FY2028; datacom ramp slower; refinancing risk on $3.2B debt; EBITDA margin stays sub-25%

base.label: 基本
base.assumption: 1.6T transceiver ramp begins Q1 FY2027; SiC recovery H2 FY2027; net debt/EBITDA reaches 2.8x by FY2027 end; non-GAAP EPS reaches $4.50 by FY2027

bull.label: 樂觀
bull.assumption: Hyperscaler 1.6T orders accelerate; NVIDIA CoPackaged Optics partnership materialises; SiC wins major EV OEM incremental volume; leverage down to 2.0x

risks.title: 高槓桿再融資風險
risks.detail: 淨負債 US$3.2B，淨負債/EBITDA ~3.8x。若 EBITDA 下修 10%，再融資成本大幅攀升

risks.title: SiC 競爭加劇
risks.detail: Wolfspeed 積極降價擴產，STMicroelectronics 在汽車 SiC 市場追趕，Coherent SiC 毛利率受壓

risks.title: 客戶集中風險
risks.detail: Hyperscaler 前三大客戶佔 Networking 營收 ~60%，單一客戶 capex 週期轉向即造成重大衝擊

risks.title: CPO 技術替代威脅
risks.detail: CoPackaged Optics 若提前商用，可能替代外部收發器模組，壓縮收發器 TAM

risks.title: 整合執行風險
risks.detail: II-VI/Coherent 合併後 ERP 系統整合仍未完成，文化差異可能影響研發協作效率

catalysts.title: Q4 FY2026 法說會（預計 Jun 2026）
catalysts.detail: 確認 1.6T 量產時程及 FY2027 年度展望，可能帶動估值重評

catalysts.title: 1.6T 收發器首批出貨（H2 2026）
catalysts.detail: 里程碑事件，預計帶動目標價上修

catalysts.title: SiC 庫存去化完成（FY2027 Q1）
catalysts.detail: Materials 部門毛利率回升確認，消除拖累因子

catalysts.title: AI Capex 週期持續擴張（2026–2027）
catalysts.detail: Google/Meta/Microsoft 2026 資本支出各超 $60B，800G 持續放量

supply_chain.description: Coherent is vertically integrated from substrate to module. For optical transceivers: InP wafers grown in-house (Saxonburg + Fremont fabs), processed into EML lasers, assembled into transceiver modules (Thailand, China). For SiC: 150mm and 200mm boule growth (Easton, PA + Auburn, AL), sliced to wafers, sold to device makers.

industry.name: Optical Transceivers + Compound Semiconductors
drivers: AI training cluster buildout (800G to 1.6T upgrade cycle)
EV powertrain SiC adoption (25% BEV penetration 2025 to 45% by 2030)
industry.competitive_dynamics: Optical transceiver market is oligopoly: Coherent, Lumentum, Fabrinet (assembly), InnoLight. SiC market: Wolfspeed, STMicro, Coherent, Onsemi — active consolidation and pricing pressure in 2025-2026.

bull_reasons: 800G transceiver 市佔率全球 #1，1.6T 領先資格認證
AI Capex 週期 2026-2027 仍為最強上行週期
垂直整合（InP 晶圓自製）保護毛利率不受外部供應商議價壓縮
bear_reasons: 淨負債 $3.2B，槓桿比 3.8x，若 EBITDA 不達標則再融資風險顯著
GAAP 持續虧損，股票酬勞稀釋效果持續
SiC 部門面臨競爭加劇及 EV 庫存調整雙重壓力
CPO 技術商用若提前，外部模組 TAM 受壓
key_monitor: 每季 Networking 部門毛利率（目標 45%+ 代表收發器組合升級）
淨負債/EBITDA 進程（目標 FY2027 <3.0x）
1.6T 收發器首批量產出貨確認時間
SiC 汽車設計案出貨恢復季度
hyperscaler 800G 庫存水位（channel check 指標）
